message:
fix(fcp-telemetry): RAII context guard and remove duplicate trace headers

Replace manual push_context/pop_context in with_context() with
StackContextGuard RAII type that pops on drop, preventing context
leaks when the future panics or is cancelled.

Fix remove_header_case_insensitive to remove ALL matching headers
(was only removing the first match). Rename to
remove_headers_case_insensitive to reflect the corrected behavior.
Add tests for duplicate header cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
